final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: character-illustration
Asset type: game splash art / character splash
Primary request: mysterious oriental-style ancient Chinese beauty playing guqin in bamboo forest under moonlight
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo grove at night, moonlight filtering through leaves creating dappled shadows on ground
Subject: elegant Hanfu-clad woman with flowing wide sleeves, serene expression, long black hair with traditional hair ornaments, seated playing guqin (Chinese zither)
Style/medium: digital painting, Chinese ink wash fusion, fantasy game art style
Composition/framing: medium shot, three-quarter view, dynamic flowing fabric movement
Lighting/mood: soft moonlight with dramatic chiaroscuro, ethereal and mystical atmosphere
Color palette: deep jade green bamboo, silver moonlight, pale blue and white Hanfu with subtle gold accents
Materials/textures: silk fabric with translucent layers, glossy bamboo stalks, smooth guqin wood surface
Constraints: flowing sleeves and ribbons must convey motion, maintain elegant and immortal fairy-like aura
Avoid: modern elements, western clothing, cluttered background, harsh artificial lighting, photorealistic skin texture
